title: Pitfalls in estimating secular changes in incidence and prevalence of dementia from administrative datasets
authors: L. Flicker; P. FitzGerald; Osvaldo P Almeida; Kaarin J Anstey; Michael Waller; M. Trevenen; Annette J. Dobson
journal: Alzheimer's & Dementia : Diagnosis, Assessment & Disease Monitoring
abstract: Administrative datasets can be used to calculate population incidence and prevalence of dementia. It is unclear how changes in data sources may affect these estimates.
